data.name: CategoriesError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during category operation.

data.name: CategoriesError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Categories.

data.name: InventoryError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Inventory.

data.name: InventoryError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during inventory operation.
